author: Unwindology
name: SP8192 + 9L Breadcrumb + EMA + Stochastic Depth
technique_summary: SP8192 byte-fallback tokenizer + 9L x 512d x 8H/4KV GQA + MLP 2x + Breadcrumb gating + EMA(0.997) + Stochastic depth + Muon optimizer + Int6 + zlib
notes: Single-seed submission from independent researcher on self-funded compute (~$300). Better 10L variant at 1.1745 BPB could not be compressed under the 16 MB cap and was excluded.
